question: Will Bitcoin hit $150k by June 30, 2026?
description:
This market will immediately resolve to "Yes" if any Binance 1 minute candle for Bitcoin (BTC/USDT) has a final "High" price equal to or greater than the price specified in the title by 11:59PM ET on the date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT "High" prices available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT, with the chart settings on "1m" for one-minute candles selected on the top bar.

Please note that the outcome of this market depends solely on the price data from the Binance BTC/USDT trading pair. Prices from other exchanges, different trading pairs, or spot markets will not be considered for the resolution of this market.

question: QatarEnergy announces/resumes LNG production in Qatar by April 30?
description:
QatarEnergy, a Qatari state-owned petroleum company, announced on March 2 that it would halt production of liquefied natural gas (LNG) due to military strikes on its operating facilities (see: https://www.qatarenergy.qa/en/MediaCenter/Pages/newsdetails.aspx?ItemId=3892).

This market will resolve to “Yes” if QatarEnergy resumes production of liquefied natural gas at QatarEnergy LNG production facilities in Qatar, or officially announces that such production has resumed or will resume, by April 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

QatarEnergy resuming the production of other halted products, including downstream LNG-related products, or resuming transportation of LNG without resuming production, will not alone count.

An official announcement that LNG production will resume at QatarEnergy LNG production facilities in Qatar must signal the end of the total LNG production halt effective immediately or on a specific date or clearly defined time window. Mere statements that production will resume at some undefined point in the future, or that production will resume once the halt has ended, will not count.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from QatarEnergy (https://www.qatarenergy.qa/en/Pages/vHome.aspx); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

events.description:

eventMetadata.context_description: QatarEnergy's preparations to restart LNG production at Ras Laffan facilities post a March 2026 halt from Iranian missile strikes drove trader consensus to near-certainty on resumption by April 30, as Reuters reported on April 8 that two of three trains at Qatargas-1 (QELNG North 1) had restarted amid a US-Iran ceasefire enabling safe Strait of Hormuz transits. This partial revival, confirmed by industry sources, aligns with market criteria for "resumes," reflecting the wisdom of crowds where traders wagered over $1.5 million on real-money assessments. Full capacity ramp-up may take months due to damage, but barring renewed military escalation, official confirmation disputes, or procedural resolution challenges via UMA oracle, the outcome appears locked in.

events.title: FC Bayern München vs. 1. FC Heidenheim 1846
events.description: This event is for the upcoming Bundesliga game, scheduled for Saturday, May 2, 2026 between FC Bayern München and 1. FC Heidenheim 1846.

eventMetadata.context_description: Bayern München's 77.5% implied probability as heavy favorites stems from their Bundesliga-leading position with the title secured, unbeaten run of five wins including 20 goals scored, and dominant 5-1 head-to-head record over 1. FC Heidenheim 1846, bolstered by home advantage at Allianz Arena. Recent 4-3 thriller win over Mainz 05 and 2-0 victory at Bayer Leverkusen underscore their attacking firepower despite Vincent Kompany's expected rotation ahead of the Champions League semi-final second leg against PSG. Injuries sidelining Serge Gnabry (adductor), Lennart Karl and Raphaël Guerreiro (hamstrings), and Tom Bischof (calf) test depth but haven't shifted trader consensus. Heidenheim, mired in 18th amid relegation fight after a 1-2 loss to Freiburg, face steep odds at 9.5% for an upset, with draw at 13% reflecting their poor away form.

eventMetadata.context_description: Villarreal's commanding third-place standing in La Liga, with a 15-point cushion over fifth and the fourth-best home record (40 points from 16 matches), drives trader consensus toward the hosts at 78.5% implied probability against struggling Levante, who sit 19th and two points from safety after a goalless draw versus Espanyol. The visitors' poor away form—nine losses in 16 outings—and Villarreal's 1-0 reverse fixture win this season further solidify the gap, despite Levante's recent DWLWWD streak aiding their relegation fight. Key absences like Villarreal's Juan Foyth and Levante's Kareem Tunde marginally temper expectations, but home advantage and head-to-head dominance (23 wins in 35) position a draw at 17.5% as the main alternative to a Levante upset at 3.5%.

question: LoL: Kiwoom DRX vs Nongshim Red Force (BO3) - LCK Rounds 1-2
description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Kiwoom DRX and Nongshim Red Force in the LCK Rounds 1-2, initially scheduled for May 2 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Kiwoom DRX" if Kiwoom DRX win the match against Nongshim Red Force.

This market will resolve to "Nongshim Red Force" if Nongshim Red Force win the match against Kiwoom DRX.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: With the Eastern Conference first-round series tied at 3-2 after Philadelphia's Game 6 road upset, Game 7 at Boston's TD Garden pits the No. 2 Celtics' home-court edge and depth against the No. 7 76ers' momentum from Tyrese Maxey and Paul George's strong showings. Key injury developments shape trader consensus: Joel Embiid is probable for Philly post-appendectomy recovery, having returned effectively, while Boston rules out Jrue Holiday (hand mallet finger) and Kristaps Porzingis (non-Covid illness), though Jayson Tatum is cleared after exiting Game 6 with calf discomfort. The Celtics hold historical playoff dominance in the rivalry, but Philly's resilience amid injuries and recent form signal a closely contested do-or-die matchup with upset potential.

events.title: Brentford FC vs. West Ham United FC
events.description: This event is for the upcoming Premier League game, scheduled for Saturday, May 2, 2026 between Brentford FC and West Ham United FC.

eventMetadata.context_description: Brentford's home advantage at Gtech Community Stadium and unbeaten record in recent head-to-heads against West Ham United—including a 2-0 league win at the London Stadium last October and a 2-2 FA Cup draw in March—drive trader consensus favoring the Bees at 51.5% implied probability, bolstering their ninth-place standing with 48 points from 34 games. Despite a lengthy injury list featuring Rico Henry (hamstring), Vitaly Janelt (metatarsal), and others like Josh Dasilva and Fabio Carvalho (knee), Brentford's solid home form (seven wins, seven draws) underpins the edge over relegation-threatened West Ham, who sit 17th on 36 points but gained momentum from a recent 2-1 Premier League victory over Everton amid minor knocks. The balanced 24.5% for draw and away win reflects a tightly contested London derby with upset potential.

question: US x Iran permanent peace deal by May 31, 2026?
description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Iran and the United states agree to a permanent peace deal by the specified date, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”. 

A permanent peace deal refers to any agreement which explicitly indicates that military hostilities between the United States and Iran have ended or will permanently cease, or uses equivalent language clearly signaling a lasting end to military hostilities between the United States and Iran. Agreements that are explicitly temporary or which do not include a definitive agreement to end military hostilities between the US and Iran on a lasting basis (e.g. a temporary extension of the two-week ceasefire agreement announced on April 7, 2026), will not qualify.

A qualifying agreement will be considered to have been established if either of the following conditions are met:

- The United States and Iran each sign or formally adopt a written agreement (e.g. a treaty or multi-point agreement) which meets the above criteria.

- Both the governments of the United States and Iran provide clear public confirmation that a qualifying agreement has been definitively established. Negotiations, statements of progress, or other statements which do not constitute a definitive announcement that a qualifying agreement has been reached will not count.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the governments of the United States and Iran; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

events.title: US x Iran permanent peace deal by...?
events.description:

Agreements that are explicitly temporary or which do not include a definitive agreement to end military hostilities between the US and Iran on a lasting basis (e.g. a temporary extension of the two-week ceasefire agreement announced on April 7, 2026), will not qualify.

- The United States and Iran each sign or formally adopt a written agreement (e.g. a treaty or multi-point agreement) which meets the above criteria.

- Both the governments of the United States and Iran provide clear public confirmation that a qualifying agreement has been definitively established. The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the governments of the United States and Iran; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Negotiations between the United States and Iran for a permanent peace deal remain stalled despite an extended ceasefire, with President Trump rejecting Tehran's latest proposal on May 1 over unresolved demands including sanctions relief, nuclear curbs, and conditions for reopening the Strait of Hormuz. Initial talks in Pakistan collapsed in mid-April amid mutual accusations, but mediators facilitated a fragile truce that halted airstrikes and blockades while preserving leverage for Phase 2 discussions on ballistic missiles and regional security. Deep trust issues, Iran's insistence on no indefinite nuclear limits, and U.S. insistence on verifiable de-escalation signals keep trader consensus skeptical of a breakthrough by June 30, though Pakistan-brokered sessions could resume soon amid economic pressures on both sides.

eventMetadata.context_description: UFC welterweight main event pits former champion Jack Della Maddalena against knockout artist Carlos Prates at UFC Fight Night in Perth, with both fighters hitting the 170-pound limit at yesterday's official weigh-ins amid a heated faceoff that required officials' intervention. Della Maddalena (18-3), the local favorite returning after a six-month layoff following a title loss to Islam Makhachev, brings technical striking and grappling upside honed on home soil at RAC Arena. Prates (23-7), riding momentum from recent finishes including a second-round KO of Leon Edwards in November 2025, boasts elite power with 18 career knockouts but faces travel and crowd factors. Trader consensus reflects a razor-close stylistic clash—volume striker versus one-punch threat—with no reported injuries altering pre-fight dynamics.

question: Will the Iranian regime fall by May 31?
description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Islamic Republic of Iran’s current ruling regime is overthrown, collapsed, or otherwise ceases to govern by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This requires a broad consensus of reporting indicating that core structures of the Islamic Republic (e.g. the office of the Supreme Leader, the Guardian Council, IRGC control under clerical authority) have been dissolved, incapacitated, or replaced by a fundamentally different governing system or otherwise lost de facto power over a majority of the population of Iran. This could occur via revolution, civil war, military coup, or voluntary abdication, but only qualifies if the Islamic Republic no longer exercises sovereign power.

Routine political events such as elections, reforms, or leadership succession do not qualify. Internal coups or power shifts that preserve the Islamic Republic’s core structures also do not qualify. Only a clear break in continuity—such as a new provisional government, revolutionary council, or constitution replacing the Islamic Republic will qualify.

Partial loss of territory or challenges from rebel or exile groups will not qualify unless the Islamic Republic no longer administers the majority of the Iranian population within Iran. 

The resolution source will be a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus prices a 97.7% probability against the Iranian regime falling by May 31, driven by its security apparatus's effective suppression of dissent amid the ongoing 2025–2026 protests and US-Israel airstrikes. In the past 30 days, a reported execution spree launched April 1 quelled immediate uprising fears, while no verified mass defections, territorial losses, or opposition breakthroughs have materialized despite economic pressures from Strait of Hormuz disruptions and leadership decapitation strikes killing figures like Ayatollah Khamenei. The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) remains intact, anchoring stability. Realistic shifts could stem from uncontainable protests, IRGC infighting, or escalated ground operations, though diplomatic ceasefire signals temper such risks.

question: Will the Detroit Pistons win the 2026 NBA Finals?
description:

events.title: 2026 NBA Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NBA Finals.

eventMetadata.context_description: Defending champion Oklahoma City Thunder lead trader consensus at 55.5% implied probability to repeat as NBA champions after sweeping the Phoenix Suns 4-0 in the Western Conference first round, capped by Shai Gilgeous-Alexander's 31-42 point performances amid their league-best regular-season mark and elite defense. San Antonio Spurs sit second at 20.0% following a strong No. 2 West seed finish where they nearly overtook OKC late in the year, powered by Victor Wembanyama's breakout and playoff momentum like a 3-1 series lead. Boston Celtics' 9.3% reflects Eastern Conference dominance but faces tougher path against surging West powers; Knicks, Pistons, and Cavaliers trail amid inconsistent East playoff showings and injury concerns as conference semifinals loom.

question: LoL: Invictus Gaming vs Anyone's Legend - Game 2 Winner
description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Invictus Gaming and Anyone's Legend in the LPL Group Ascend, initially scheduled for May 2 at 7:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Invictus Gaming" if Invictus Gaming win Game 2 against Anyone's Legend.

This market will resolve to "Anyone's Legend" if Anyone's Legend win Game 2 against Invictus Gaming.

If the match begins but is not completed, and Game 2 is concluded with a winner determined, this market will resolve based on the completed Game 2. 

If Game 2 is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50. 

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without play beginning, this market will resolve 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: LoL: Invictus Gaming vs Anyone's Legend (BO3) - LPL Group Ascend
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Invictus Gaming and Anyone's Legend in the LPL Group Ascend, initially scheduled for May 2 at 7:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Invictus Gaming" if Invictus Gaming win the match against Anyone's Legend.

This market will resolve to "Anyone's Legend" if Anyone's Legend win the match against Invictus Gaming.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Anyone's Legend enters this LPL Split 2 Group Ascend BO3 rematch against Invictus Gaming with momentum from a four-series win streak, including a 2-0 sweep over IG last week and a stunning 2-0 upset of Top Esports, bolstering their 6-3 record and top-four playoff positioning in the double round-robin format. Invictus Gaming, sitting at 4-5 after snapping a skid with a 2-1 win over Weibo Gaming, relies on top laner Breathe and jungler Wei to counter AL's potent top-jungle duo of Tarzan and sasi amid patch 16.08 macro shifts favoring aggressive early game. Head-to-head favors AL recently, but IG's home crowd and desperation for climbing could spark an upset in this pivotal group stage clash.

question: Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by May 15?
description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if IMF Portwatch publishes a 7-day moving average of transit calls (“Arrivals of Ships”) for the Strait of Hormuz equal to or above 60 for any date between market creation and May 15, 2026. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Daily transit calls include container, dry bulk, roll-on/roll-off, general cargo, and tanker ships. Ships not reported by IMF Portwatch will not be considered.

This market will resolve as soon as IMF Portwatch publishes a 7-day moving average of transit calls equal to or above the specified level, or once data has been published for the final date in the specified period and no such value has been published. If no data has been published for the final date of the specified period within 14 calendar days (ET) after the end of that period, this market will resolve based on data published up to that point.

Revisions to previously published data points made within this market’s timeframe will be considered. However, they will not disqualify a previously published data point from qualifying. Revisions to previously published data points after data is published for May 31, 2026, however, will not be considered.

The resolution source for this market will be IMF Portwatch, specifically the transit calls data published for the Strait of Hormuz at https://portwatch.imf.org/pages/cb5856222a5b4105adc6ee7e880a1730, both in the chart and through downloadable files.

eventMetadata.context_description: Ongoing reciprocal blockades by Iran and the United States have kept Strait of Hormuz shipping traffic at about 5% of pre-February 2026 crisis levels, with only 6-14 vessels—mostly Iran-linked—transiting daily versus the normal 125-140, per recent Kpler and Reuters tracking. Despite an April 8 ceasefire, Iran reimposed restrictions after ship attacks and failed negotiations, while US naval enforcement redirects Iran-bound tankers, stranding over 2,000 vessels in the Persian Gulf. Fresh US warnings on May 2 against sanctions for paying Iranian tolls underscore persistent risks, alongside elevated insurance premiums and routing uncertainty. Traders' 94.5% consensus against normalization by May 15 reflects this stalemate, though a diplomatic breakthrough or de-escalation could shift odds.
